content: AlphaGeometry solves 25 out of 30 (83.3%) problems on the IMO-AG-30 benchmark, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art (Wu's method: 10/30) and approaching the performance of an average IMO gold medalist
keywords: Human-level comparison: IMO gold medalist avg (25.9/30).
No human demonstrations used for training.

content: The traceback algorithm (in trace_back.py) identifies an unused premise in IMO 2004 P1, leading to the discovery of a more general theorem.
keywords: Discovery of a more general theorem.
Demonstrates capacity for novel mathematical insight.
